name: development
description: Stage 3 — continuous .NET 10 development, driven by the GitHub backlog one issue at a time. Aspire, EF Core 10, and Microsoft Agent Framework references Claude reaches for automatically while coding, plus the Aspire backbone, pluggable-connector pattern, the issue-driven build engine, and the work-next-issue loop that orchestrates the feature-builder and runtime-verifier agents (build → prove → PR). The default coding-stage plugin.
